title: miconia bahorucensis
intro: Miconia bahorucensis, also known as Bahoruc or Andean Tree Violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Miconia bahorucensis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat gastrointestinal issues, among others. Miconia bahorucensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wounds.
